content: Braintree Town defender Tommy Smith is looking forward to the "crowning glory of his career" at the World Cup with New Zealand.

zh.title: 布雷因特里后卫随新西兰参加世界杯
zh.summary: 布雷因特里镇后卫汤米·史密斯已入选新西兰世界杯球队，他称这是职业生涯的"最大荣誉"。这一选择对这位低级别联赛的后卫来说是一项重大成就。

title: Khusanov named in Uzbekistan's World Cup squad
summary: Manchester City defender Abdukodir Khusanov has been selected for Uzbekistan's World Cup squad, which is managed by former World Cup winner Fabio Cannavaro. The inclusion strengthens Uzbekistan's defensive options for the tournament.
content: Manchester City defender Abdukodir Khusanov makes Uzbekistan's squad for the World Cup, led by former World Cup winner Fabio Cannavaro.

zh.title: 库萨诺夫入选乌兹别克斯坦世界杯大名单

title: World Cup 2026: All 48 squads confirmed
summary: All 48 national team squads have been officially confirmed for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which will be held across the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The expanded tournament format features more teams than any previous World Cup.
content: All 48 confirmed squads for the 2026 World Cup in the US, Canada and Mexico.

zh.title: 2026年世界杯：所有48支球队名单确认
zh.summary: 2026年FIFA世界杯的所有48支国家队名单已正式确认，该赛事将在美国、加拿大和墨西哥举办。扩大后的赛事格式包含了比以往任何世界杯都多的球队。

title: Japan benefit from new World Cup substitution rule
summary: Japan becomes one of the first teams to benefit from the new time-limited substitution rule when they score with opponents Iceland reduced to 10 players during a substitution window. The rule change is already impacting match outcomes.
content: Japan become one of the first beneficiaries of the new time-limited substitution rule as they score while opponents Iceland have just 10 players on the pitch.

zh.title: 日本受益于世界杯新换人规则
zh.summary: 日本成为首批受益于新的限时换人规则的球队之一，当对手冰岛在换人窗口期间被罚至10人时，日本进球得分。这一规则变化已经在影响比赛结果。

title: Sir Kenny Dalglish undergoing treatment for cancer
summary: Scotland, Liverpool and Celtic legend Sir Kenny Dalglish has publicly confirmed he is undergoing cancer treatment. The announcement affects one of football's most revered figures.
content: Scotland, Liverpool and Celtic great Sir Kenny Dalglish confirms he is undergoing treatment for cancer.

title: Alaba passed fit but Baumgartner out of World Cup
summary: Austria captain David Alaba has been cleared to participate in the World Cup after recovering from a muscle injury, but midfielder Christoph Baumgartner has been ruled out of the tournament. The dual outcome reshapes Austria's midfield options.
content: Austria captain David Alaba is given the all-clear to travel for the World Cup after picking up a muscle injury on Monday but midfielder Christoph Baumgartner is ruled out of the tournament.

title: Humble, powerful, ready - Semenyo returns to where World Cup rise began

content: As Mexico prepares to become the first country to host or co-host the World Cup three times, BBC Sport looks at its Cornish footballing roots.
